description: STM32F407: HAL_UART_TxCpltCallback and HAL_UART_RxCpltCallback both execute in ISR (DMA interrupt) context. TxCpltCallback calls xSemaphoreGive (non-FromISR, ISR-001) with no portYIELD_FROM_ISR (ISR-002). RxCpltCallback calls xQueueSend (non-FromISR, ISR-001) with no portYIELD_FROM_ISR (ISR-002). STM32F4 has no D-Cache so STM-001/002/003 do not apply.
